subcodes.first_line: Be it known unto the beloved of God that during the days of sojourn in the Land of Mystery, exalted Tablets were revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و معلوم احبای الهی بوده در ایام توقف در ارض سر الواح منیعه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @predictions and prophecies, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals
